using System.Collections.Generic;
using MintPlayer.Spark.Abstractions;

namespace MintPlayer.Spark.Generated
{
    internal static class SparkTranslationsRegistry
    {
        public static readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, TranslatedString> All = Build();
        
        [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Initialize()
        {
            SparkTranslations.Register(All);
        }
        
        private static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, TranslatedString> Build()
        {
            var d = new Dictionary<string, TranslatedString>(System.StringComparer.Ordinal);
            d["farewell"] = new TranslatedString { Translations = new Dictionary<string, string> { ["en"] = "Bye", ["nl"] = "Tot ziens" } };
            d["greeting"] = new TranslatedString { Translations = new Dictionary<string, string> { ["en"] = "Hello", ["nl"] = "Hallo" } };
            d["shared"] = new TranslatedString { Translations = new Dictionary<string, string> { ["en"] = "FromHost" } };
            return d;
        }
    }
}
